englishDefinitions: To have a period in youth of wild, irresponsible, or sexually adventurous behavior, usually before settling down.
persianTranslation: دوران خوش‌گذرانی و شیطنت جوانی را گذراندن
دوران بی‌بندوباری/سبک‌سری جوانی را پشت سر گذاشتن
examples: He spent his twenties sowing his wild oats before starting a family.
People said she was just sowing her wild oats, but she was really making bad choices.
Not everyone needs to sow their wild oats before they get serious about life.
